note: Lane PG-004: smart_sd tool had issues with tab/space whitespace mismatches when trying to replace multi-line text blocks. Several attempts failed because the old text didn't match due to invisible whitespace differences. The tool would benefit from a whitespace-agnostic mode or better error messages showing the exact mismatch. Also, git stash partially failed due to permission issues with .opencode/tool/ files, which caused partial revert of several source files and wasted time re-applying changes.
